Services

Professional planning, tailored to your site

Seven disciplines under one roof — so your project moves through every stage with a single, accountable team.

01Town Planning 02Urban Design 03Master Planning 04Project Management 05Development Consultancy 06Retail Network Planning 07Socio-Economic Analysis
Town Planning

Statutory planning,
handled end to end

Town planning sits at the centre of every project we take on — rezoning, subdivision, consolidation and change-of-use submissions — backed by the same discipline behind our township subdivision work across Botswana.

Rezoning applications Land-use management
Discuss this service
Urban Design

Spatial frameworks
that hold together

We start with site analysis — context, topography, access and surrounding land use — then build spatial frameworks for movement and public realm that hold up once a site is built and in use.

Site analysis Design frameworks
Discuss this service
Master Planning

Long-term strategy,
delivered in phases

We set out long-term strategies for how land use, movement and public realm should evolve across a site or precinct, including the Development Manager Model Package No. 1 master plans delivered with HSNV.

Precinct strategy Phased delivery
Discuss this service
Project Management

Delivery, from
brief to handover

We coordinate consultants, contractors, authorities and timelines so a development stays on scope and schedule — the same delivery coordination behind our service station work from Maun to Palapye.

Stakeholder engagement Compliance management
Discuss this service
Development Consultancy

Feasibility and
approval strategy

Feasibility studies, compliance checks and approval strategy so a client understands a site's constraints and opportunities before committing capital — from a Gaborone guest-house conversion to a Francistown filling-station redesign.

Feasibility studies Advisory support
Discuss this service
Retail Network Planning

Catchment and
location strategy

We assess catchment, access and competing locations for retail and fuel-network operators — the same site-selection work behind our service station projects in Maun and Palapye.

Catchment analysis Location strategy
Discuss this service
Socio-Economic Analysis

Evidence behind
every recommendation

Socio-economic analysis grounds a plan in the realities of the people and communities it affects — evidence, not assumption, behind every land-use and feasibility decision we make for clients.

Impact assessment Local data analysis
Discuss this service
